# SchemaCheck API

Schema markup validation API for developers and AI agents. Validates Schema.org JSON-LD structured data against Google's current rich result requirements.

## Authentication
- Header: `x-api-key: YOUR_KEY`
- Query param: `access_key=YOUR_KEY`

## Endpoint
GET /api/v1/validate?url=https://example.com&access_key=YOUR_KEY
POST /api/v1/validate (body: {"url": "..."} or {"jsonld": {...}})

## What it validates
- JSON-LD syntax and structure
- Required properties per Google's specs
- Recommended properties (flagged as warnings)
- Rich result eligibility
- Deprecated type detection (HowTo, FAQPage restrictions, etc.)

## Supported Schema Types (35 total across 4 tiers)

### Tier 1 — Full validation (7 types)
Article (NewsArticle, BlogPosting, TechArticle, ScholarlyArticle), Product, LocalBusiness (Restaurant, Store, Hotel, MedicalBusiness), Organization (Corporation, EducationalOrganization, NGO), BreadcrumbList, WebSite, FAQPage

### Tier 2 — Standard validation (10 types, coming soon)
Review (AggregateRating), Recipe, Event (MusicEvent, SportsEvent, EducationEvent), VideoObject (Clip), SoftwareApplication (WebApplication, MobileApplication, VideoGame), JobPosting, Course (CourseInstance), ItemList, QAPage, ProductGroup

### Tier 3 — Basic validation (10 types, planned)
Book (Audiobook), Dataset (DataCatalog), DiscussionForumPosting, EmployerAggregateRating, Movie, ImageObject, ProfilePage, MerchantReturnPolicy, OfferShippingDetails, ClaimReview

### Tier 4 — Basic validation (5 types, planned)
MathSolver, Quiz, LoyaltyProgram, VacationRental, CreativeWork (subscription/paywalled content)

### Deprecated — Validated with warnings (3 types)
HowTo (retired Aug 2024), SpecialAnnouncement (retired 2025), Vehicle/Car (retired 2025)

## Response Format
Returns: schemas_found, per-schema errors/warnings with fix suggestions, rich_result_eligible boolean, validation score (0-100), Google docs links

## Billing
- Free: 100 validations/month
- Cached results and failed requests don't consume credits
- Paid plans: $19/mo (3K), $79/mo (15K), $199/mo (75K)

## Limitations
- JSON-LD only (Microdata and RDFa not yet supported)
- URL fetch timeout: 10 seconds
- Maximum 5 redirects followed

## MCP Server
npm install schemacheck-mcp

## Reference Documentation
- Google Structured Data Guide: https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/intro-structured-data
- Google Rich Result Gallery: https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/search-gallery
- Schema.org Full Type List (827 types): https://schema.org/docs/full.html
- Schema.org Developers: https://schema.org/docs/developers.html
- SchemaCheck Docs: https://schemacheck.dev/docs
- SchemaCheck OpenAPI Spec: https://schemacheck.dev/openapi.json
